seoTitle: Euston vs Evans Plains — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Euston and Evans Plains. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Euston vs Evans Plains: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Euston and Evans Plains.
heading: Euston vs Evans Plains — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Euston, New South Wales and Evans Plains, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Euston has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Evans Plains (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Euston or Evans Plains safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Euston has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Evans Plains scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Euston scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Evans Plains scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Euston or Evans Plains?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Euston has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
